option.name: originalContent
option.value: FROM openjdk:21-jdk-slim ARG JAR_FILE=target/reserva-0.0.1.jar COPY ${JAR_FILE} app_reserva.jar EXPOSE 8080 ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "app_reserva.jar"]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jdk ARG JAR_FILE=target/reserva-0.0.1.jar COPY ${JAR_FILE} app_reserva.jar EXPOSE 8080 ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "app_reserva.jar"]
